releaseNotes: Custom LLM API key support (OpenAI/Groq/Together/DeepSeek/Mistral/OpenRouter). Shadow Chat now shows actual errors. Better UI fonts.

notes: NEW: Custom LLM — add your own API key (OpenAI, Groq, Together, OpenRouter, DeepSeek, Mistral)
NEW: 6 quick-setup presets for popular providers
NEW: Test Connection button — verifies API key and endpoint before enabling
NEW: LLM mode system — Custom API > Native Model > External LLM
FIX: Shadow Chat now shows the ACTUAL error message instead of generic 'neural link destabilized'
FIX: Shadow Chat status badge shows which AI engine is active (Custom API / Local Model / External)
FIX: Better fonts in Shadow Chat — Inter/Segoe UI instead of monospace for message text
FIX: Input box uses system font for better readability
Improved error handling: 401 (invalid key), 404 (model not found), 429 (rate limit), 503 (not ready)
LLM speed fix — compact prompt for 2B model, max_tokens 256, 180s timeout
Quest persistence fix, remove daily tasks, quest engine from protocols/habits/books only, AI memory
Shadow Chat LLM model path fix, changelog fix, quest anti-cheat
Critical preload fix, GPU compatibility for animations
Update preserves all user data, store items cheap (2-5 NC)
Fixed LLM install button, store prices, update crash
Store preview, PDF guides, sound effects, charts, export/import
Shadow Chat redesign, tutorial, Mission Debrief, EXP overhaul
Persona selector, CPU-only LLM, website overhaul
Streak window, domain badges, Mission Debrief, Changelog
Update button, logout, splash, HabitLab, multi-agent
Initial release
